skill_changes.reason: The benchmark may run against OpenAI-compatible transcription gateways whose default model differs from OpenAI. The helper keeps the original curl-based workflow, adds provider-aware default model selection for Groq/vveai-style gateways, falls back from WHISPER_* to OPENAI_* only when needed, and fails loudly on HTTP/API error payloads instead of treating error JSON as a transcript.
Translation skill kept as-is for English→Chinese rendering with the user-supplied glossary; runtime is provided by the task setup service so executor-facing docs avoid install instructions.

Replaces the prior video-transcript-downloader injection (yt-dlp / YouTube tooling — irrelevant for a local mp4). ffmpeg-video-editor provides the natural-language → ffmpeg command guidance the executor actually needs to extract audio from /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/talk.mp4 before feeding it to the Whisper helper.

Replaces the prior video-subtitles injection (Hebrew / English-only ivrit.ai+Whisper tooling — wrong language for English→Chinese subtitling). markdown-formatter directly supports producing the bilingual paragraph-by-paragraph talk.zh.md the prompt asks for.
